title: pelargonium × patens
intro: Pelargonium × patens, also known as the rose-scented geranium, is a hybrid species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, antiviral, and anti-inflammatory effects, which make it a popular remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Pelargonium × patens include its ability to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression, as well as its potential to help regulate menstrual cycles and soothe digestive problems. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils, can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
